name: fastlanes
claim: nested encodings designed for parallel SIMD-friendly decoding
claim_summary: results are host- and workload-sensitive: the full Linux retry crashed in numeric and string cases and failed the mixed-schema harness; a focused 1,024-row mixed retry rebuilt the binding but reproduced the mixed-schema failure
correction: the earlier numeric -11 result used comma-separated input against the official pipe-delimited reader; a separate Linux retry with the corrected delimiter still observed SIGSEGV, so the earlier numeric success is not a general claim

attempts.result: 1,024 and 2,048 succeeded; partial vectors failed dictionary lookup

attempts.entrypoint: official reader with invalid comma-delimited input
attempts.result: process exited -11; retained as robustness evidence

attempts.entrypoint: official pyfastlanes binding on Linux x86_64
attempts.workload: 1,000,000 numeric rows, five string-boundary cases, one 13-column mixed case, and malformed comma input
attempts.build_command: nix develop --command python -m venv native/fastlanes/.venv; nix develop --command native/fastlanes/.venv/bin/python -m pip install scikit-build-core==0.11.6 cmake==4.4.0 ninja==1.13.0 pybind11==2.12.1 setuptools-scm==8.3.1; CMAKE_BUILD_PARALLEL_LEVEL=4 nix develop --command native/fastlanes/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --no-build-isolation -e native/fastlanes
attempts.result: numeric and all five string cases exited SIGSEGV; the mixed 13-column case raised RuntimeError UNREACHABLE; malformed comma input raised RuntimeError. The workflow preserved per-case inputs, artifacts, logs, and SHA-256 hashes.

attempts.entrypoint: official pyfastlanes editable build with scikit-build-core
attempts.workload: build the Python extension before a 13-column mixed-schema round trip
attempts.build_command: nix develop --command bash -euo pipefail -c 'cd <fastlanes-checkout>; python3 -m venv .venv; .venv/bin/python -m pip install scikit-build-core==0.11.6 cmake==4.4.0 ninja==1.13.0 pybind11==2.12.1 setuptools-scm==8.3.1; CMAKE_BUILD_PARALLEL_LEVEL=4 .venv/bin/python -m pip install --no-build-isolation -e .'
attempts.result: build stopped at src/table/stats.cpp:17 for TypedStats<std::string> with -Werror,-Wnonnull; no mixed-schema round trip was attempted

attempts.entrypoint: official quick_fuzz_test at the pinned source commit
attempts.workload: 10 cases, seed 14, pipe delimiter, 1-2 columns, 65,536 rows
attempts.result: target built after warning overrides; all 10 CTest cases exited SIGTRAP

attempts.workload: 1,024 rows and 13 pipe-delimited columns; numeric, string-boundary, and malformed cases skipped by the mixed case scope
attempts.result: the official extension built, but the mixed case raised RuntimeError UNREACHABLE at wizard.cpp:1252. The fresh worker preserved the error as status FAILED and exited normally; the lab classifies this as TARGET_FAILED, not a harness failure. No data.fls or decoded.csv was produced. This is an observation, not an upstream bug attribution.

retry_when: a pinned source and toolchain complete the 13-column mixed-schema round trip without numeric or string SIGSEGV or UNREACHABLE, with the same result independently reproduced on macOS and Linux
